"[4] IPHONE DETECTED CRASH THAT LIKELY RESULTED IN INJURY / UNK VEH DESC/ UNK HOW MANY OCCP'S / NFD/ NFI"
"[16] [Appended, 16:01:13] [5] WHRE YOU IN A TC /DESCRIPTION OF THE VEHS AND LOCATION"

"[13] [Appended, 16:01:13] [2] A user is requesting emergency services from an Apple device via satellite. Transmit and receive times may be longer than for cellular SMS. User responses may be delayed due to satellite movements. The user CANNOT MAKE OR RECEIVE A VOICE CALL because they are outside cellular coverage. Time of request: 10:49PM UTC. A USER requested emergency services near these coordinates: Latitude 34.2621 (N), Longitude -117.8453 (W).1 minThe user's iPhone detected a VEHICLE CRASH that is LIKELY TO HAVE RESULTED IN INJURY. It is UNKNOWN how many OCCUPANTS may have been in the vehicle. This concludes the automatically-assembled data. You may now attempt to contact the user. However, messages may be delayed, and the user may not be able to respond.1 minResponders may need to search an area extending at least 10 meters in all directions for a 95% chance of finding the user. The user's estimated altitude (HAE) is 665 meters. Responders may need to search 10 meters above and below this level for a 95% chance of finding the user. Enhanced Emergency Data may be available. QUERY ADDITIONAL DATA! The battery level of the user's device is 31-60%. Their phone number is +17143414576.1 minSYSTEM: We received your 9-1-1 text message. You can wait for the next available call taker or you can CALL 9-1-1.1 minThis Emergency SOS via satellite session was transferred to the Emergency Relay Center because no PSAP response was received. You may receive or have received a relay voice call for an incident with this same location data. Please verify that your TCC connection and text handling systems are functioning normally, and that dispatchers are logged in to receive texts to avoid relay fallback for future Emergency SOS via satellite sessions. To reach the Emergency Relay Center call 620-317-0404 or toll-free 855-251-2181.1 min(714) 341-4576"
"[2] 5 FOOT 9 INCHES TALL, 160 POUNDS, BROWN EYES, STRAIGHT BROWN HAIR. HAS LARGE CHEST SCAR FROM PRIVIOUS OPEN HEART SURGERY."
